title: senecio armoricanus
intro: Senecio armoricanus, also known as the Armorican ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The Armorican ragwort is believed to offer various health benefits, including relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential anti-cancer and antioxidant properties. Senecio armoricanus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its preparation and use should be done under the guidance of a medical professional.
